Smoke News

Welcome to the smoke test newsroom, a tiny fixture site that exists so the whole crawl and clean pipeline can be exercised end to end on a laptop without touching the public internet. Every article below is served from the local machine, carries an explicit license marker in the footer, and contains enough natural prose that the quality filters have real sentences to measure instead of empty boilerplate text.

  • Hà Nội và làn sóng công nghệ mới.
  • Thông tin liên hệ trung tâm hỗ trợ.
  • City council approves the new budget.
  • City council approves the new budget (syndicated copy).
  • A deliberately thin page.
  • An article with no license marker.
Content released under CC BY 4.0.
